name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
【Top Grade Original】SOLFERINO BOX Black
2020 IT BAG_ Hot Seller. It conquered the fashion world before it even launched, inspired by the Paris street name Rue De Solferino! The bag uses original factory fine pin-stripe Box calfskin, with excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed 'L' letter top and bottom half-open clasp completely overturns your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim, 'I didn't know a bag could open like this,' simply too fun!
Model: 634306
Size: 19×13×5cm
